title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: Freshly printed docs
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just polished up the API documentation to match the latest production deploy.
gist.summary: Automated sync of APIDOCS.md to reflect the latest OpenAPI spec changes from production.
gist.impact: Developers reading the API documentation will see the most up-to-date endpoint specifications.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old documentation pages while the Bee mascot prints out fresh new ones from a retro terminal.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating old documentation papers while the cute bee mascot prints fresh new pages from a retro terminal. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
